default.title: GPU installation requires backend-specific setup.
default.text: GPU support depends on your operating system, CUDA version, GPU model, and installed drivers.
default.small_text: After installing the correct GPU-enabled backend, install MEYELens using the CPU/default command.

tensorflow.title: TensorFlow GPU installation requires a CUDA-compatible setup.
tensorflow.text: GPU support depends on your operating system, CUDA version, GPU model, and installed drivers.
tensorflow.small_text: After installing the correct TensorFlow GPU backend, install MEYELens using the CPU/default command.

pytorch.title: PyTorch GPU installation requires selecting the correct CUDA build.
pytorch.text: Use the official PyTorch selector to choose the correct command for your operating system, package manager, and CUDA version.
pytorch.small_text: After installing the correct PyTorch GPU backend, install MEYELens using the CPU/default command.
